jobs.title: PRADA Sales Associate, Outlet
IT Regional Warehouse Specialist
jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 We are looking for an IT Regional Warehouse specialist to join our IT Industrial team. The ideal candidate will be involved in all the IT activities of implementation and support to the regional W/H projects and tasks. 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 
 Cross-functional Collaboration: actively participates in internal meetings with different business area managers. Collaborates with other workgroups to achieve IT objectives. 
 
 Business Analysis and process improvement: collaborating with stakeholders to identify issues, redesign workflows, and optimize business processes through SAP solutions in synch with his IT team. 
 
 User Training and Documentation: creating user manuals, functional specifications, and conducting training sessions to ensure smooth adoption of new processes. 
 
 System Maintanance: performs routine and extraordinary maintenance. Conducts system tests on new implementations in accordance with his IT team. 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 3+ years of experience in similar roles. 

 
 Degree in Computer Science or similar is a must. 

 
 D eep knowledge of specific SAP modules (SAP S/4HANA - EWM) and integration points. 

 
 Analytical Thinking: ability to translate complex business processes into technical SAP solutions. 

 
 S trong interpersonal skills to collaborate with functional teams and stakeholders. 

 
 Project Management: ability to manage project timelines and deliverables respecting the budget limit. 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.title: MIU MIU Client Advisor
PRADA Client Advisor
Data Engineer
jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 We are looking for a Data Engineer to join our global Cloud Data Platform team, based in Milan. The ideal candidate will play a key role in managing data operations, with main activities ranging from analysis, modeling and development, with a strong focus on sales, customer, and marketing data.

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 
 Gain a deep understanding of business and technical needs to support model evolution and drive digital transformation. A particular focus will be on customer intelligence data and sales KPIs.
 
 Design, maintain, and enhance key datasets to ensure they are high-quality, certified, and easily accessible/integrable by enterprise users, components, and systems.
 
 Analyze and develop data operations and pipelines in line with enterprise guidelines and best practices (e.g., data quality processes, governance, and deep catalog/glossary curation).
 
 Work collaboratively with business stakeholders and end users to build scalable and agile solutions.
 
 Develop, deploy, and manage highly efficient and automated data pipelines using cloud-based technologies and platform capabilities (e.g., Azure, Databricks, Unity Catalog, Git based CI/CD).
 
 Continuously adapt to evolving requirements by maintaining and improving existing data pipelines, integrating new features and change requests using an agile approach.
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 

 
 Bachelor or Master's degree in Software Engineering, Computer Science, Mathematics or related STEM discipline

 
 3+ years experience in intensive data ops. in the context of Big Data and cloud infrastructures / platforms

 
 Strong experience in analytics in the context of retail industry, with a particular focus on modeling and leveraging sales and customer KPIs.

 
 Strong background in Big Data approaches and DBMS/Data Warehouse modeling, optimization, and management. Deep knowledge of SQL and Spark-related programming languages is a must.

 
 Extensive expertise in data preparation, integration, modeling, and governance processes.

 
 Proven experience in designing and managing end-to-end production ready solutions.

 
 Experience in developing microservices and APIs solutions (e.g., REST, OAuth).

 
 Proficiency in configuring and utilizing cloud infrastructures and platforms, with a strong preference for Microsoft Azure services.

 
 Familiarity with stream-processing systems and lambda architectures, Delta Live Tables, Azure Event Hubs, Spark Streaming, etc.

 
 Fluent in Italian and in English written and spoken

 
 A good knowledge of retail and/or customer related processes and back end operational systems will be considered a plus

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.title: IT CRM Specialist
jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 The Junior IT CRM Specialist will support the IT CRM Manager in the daily operational management and continuous evolution of Microsoft Dynamics 365 and related custom web applications. 

 
 The role will involve activities such as operational support, structured analysis, and internal delivery follow-up. 

 
 The position requires organizational skills, analytical mindset, and the ability to work closely alongside the IT CRM Manager within a structured enterprise IT environment. 

 
 The resource will operate as an operational support to the IT CRM Manager, helping monitor ongoing activities, organize internal tasks, and ensure proper follow-up with development teams and system integrators. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 
 Manage tickets, incidents, and minor enhancements in Microsoft Dynamics 365/Salesforce 
 
 Support the IT CRM Manager in monitoring sprint activities and task progress 
 
 Facilitate internal stand-up meetings within the technical team when required 
 
 Support validation of vendor deliveries against defined requirements 
 
 Maintain technical and functional documentation 
 
 Execute basic system configurations (forms, views, fields, business rules, security roles) 
 
 Support SIT and UAT activities from a technical perspective 
 
 Contribute to front-end development activities using Vue.js and/or React (Nice to have) 
 
 Collaborate with backend developers on integrations and APIs (Nice to have) 
 
 Assist in maintaining solution quality and compliance with internal standards 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 

 
 At least 2 years of experience in similar roles. 

 
 Degree in Computer Science or similar is a must. 

 
 

 
 Basic knowledge of CRM processes (Sales and/or Customer Service) 

 
 Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. 

 
 Basic knowledge of SQL 

 
 Familiarity with Agile methodology 

 
 Experience in CRM or enterprise application environments 

 
 Introductory knowledge of Azure 

 
 Experience working with system integrators 

 
 Front-end development knowledge in: Vue.js and/or React, JavaScript (ES6+),HTML5 / CSS3 

 
 Understanding of Dataverse and Power Platform (Power Automate / Power Apps – basic level) 

 
 Understanding of REST APIs and system integrations 

 
 Knowledge of relational data models 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

 Facilitate internal stand-up meetings within the technical team when required 
 
 Support validation of vendor deliveries against defined requirements 
 
 Maintain technical and functional documentation 
 
 Execute basic system configurations (forms, views, fields, business rules, security roles) 
 
 Support SIT and UAT activities from a technical perspective 
 
 Contribute to front-end development activities using Vue.js and/or React (Nice to have) 
 
 Collaborate with backend developers on integrations and APIs (Nice to have) 
 
 Assist in maintaining solution quality and compliance with internal standards 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 

 
 At least 2 years of experience in similar roles. 

 
 Degree in Computer Science or similar is a must. 

 
 

 
 Basic knowledge of CRM processes (Sales and/or Customer Service) 

 
 Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. 

 
 Basic knowledge of SQL 

 
 Familiarity with Agile methodology 

 
 Experience in CRM or enterprise application environments 

 
 Introductory knowledge of Azure 

 
 Experience working with system integrators 

 
 Front-end development knowledge in: Vue.js and/or React, JavaScript (ES6+),HTML5 / CSS3 

 
 Understanding of Dataverse and Power Platform (Power Automate / Power Apps – basic level) 

 
 Understanding of REST APIs and system integrations 

 
 Knowledge of relational data models 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.
descriptionByLocale.de:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 The Junior IT CRM Specialist will support the IT CRM Manager in the daily operational management and continuous evolution of Microsoft Dynamics 365 and related custom web applications. 

 
 The role will involve activities such as operational support, structured analysis, and internal delivery follow-up. 

 
 The position requires organizational skills, analytical mindset, and the ability to work closely alongside the IT CRM Manager within a structured enterprise IT environment. 

 
 The resource will operate as an operational support to the IT CRM Manager, helping monitor ongoing activities, organize internal tasks, and ensure proper follow-up with development teams and system integrators. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 
 Manage tickets, incidents, and minor enhancements in Microsoft Dynamics 365/Salesforce 
 
 Support the IT CRM Manager in monitoring sprint activities and task progress 
 
 Facilitate internal stand-up meetings within the technical team when required 
 
 Support validation of vendor deliveries against defined requirements 
 
 Maintain technical and functional documentation 
 
 Execute basic system configurations (forms, views, fields, business rules, security roles) 
 
 Support SIT and UAT activities from a technical perspective 
 
 Contribute to front-end development activities using Vue.js and/or React (Nice to have) 
 
 Collaborate with backend developers on integrations and APIs (Nice to have) 
 
 Assist in maintaining solution quality and compliance with internal standards 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 

 
 

 
 At least 2 years of experience in similar roles. 

 
 Degree in Computer Science or similar is a must. 

 
 

 
 Basic knowledge of CRM processes (Sales and/or Customer Service) 

 
 Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. 

 
 Basic knowledge of SQL 

 
 Familiarity with Agile methodology 

 
 Experience in CRM or enterprise application environments 

 
 Introductory knowledge of Azure 

 
 Experience working with system integrators 

 
 Front-end development knowledge in: Vue.js and/or React, JavaScript (ES6+),HTML5 / CSS3 

 
 Understanding of Dataverse and Power Platform (Power Automate / Power Apps – basic level) 

 
 Understanding of REST APIs and system integrations 

 
 Knowledge of relational data models 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.title: MIU MIU Store Manager Saint Moritz

titleByLocale.it: Store Manager MIU MIU Saint Moritz
titleByLocale.en: MIU MIU Store Manager Saint Moritz
titleByLocale.de: MIU MIU Store Manager Saint Moritz
titleByLocale.fr: MIU MIU Store Manager Saint Moritz

jobs.description:
Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. 

 
 

 
 

 JOB PURPOSE 

 
 

 
 As the Brand Store Manager, you are a passionate Brand Ambassador and a business leader, who conveys the Brand philosophy and values to the local market, the Store team and to the final Client. 

 
 

 
 

 
 RESPONSIBILITIES 

 
 

 
 Leading the Business 

 
 
 Drive Store Team to exceed Financial targets and maximize sales performances, determining the success of the entire store 
 
 Propose and develop action plans, through careful analysis of performance 
 
 Drive the Store team to exceed their KPI targets, including cross selling and up selling among product categories 

 
 
 
 Client Development 

 
 
 Place the Client above all, leading by example to create a welcoming environment and to ensure the Team strives to meet their every need and request 
 
 Foster a Client centric mindset developing and maintaining solid Client relationships and enforcing meaningful after sales experiences 
 
 Guarantee an excellent Client satisfaction and the highest level of Client service through the execution of the “Brand Selling Ceremony” 
 
 
 

 
 Team Management 

 
 
 Act as a strong Staff motivator, promoting team spırıt through effective communication, and cultivating a positive and energetic environment, even to the eyes of the Client 
 
 Encourage the exchange of information within the team and proactively develop morning briefing on specific topics 
 
 Master fully all company tools and applications including IT and digital, and ensure team is constantly informed of relevant updates 
 
 Understand the needs and priorities, train and inspire the Store team on product knowledge, sales techniques, Client Services, and Company policies and procedures 
 
 
 

 
 Boutique Care 

 
 
 Lead by example to ensure the Team operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Product, evident in every ceremony or procedure 
 
 Ensure display attracts Clients and maximizes sales, in accordance with Company guidelines – proactively seek VM and MD support based on store needs 
 
 Provıde feedback and suggestions when necessary to the Visual Merchandising and the Retail Merchandising departments 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS 
 

 
 At least 8 years of experience 

 
 Strong problem-solving and organizational skills 

 
 Ability to manage multiple priorities and coordinate across functions 

 
 Excellent communication skills and team spirit 

 
 Fluency in both Italian and English 

 

 
 

 
 Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. 
 Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

jobs.title: Mendrisio Outlet Client Advisor part-time domenicale (limited contract)

titleByLocale.it: Mendrisio Outlet Client Consulente Part-time domenicale (limited contract)
titleByLocale.en: Mendrisio Outlet Client Advisor part-time domenicale (limited contract)
titleByLocale.de: Mendrisio Outlet Client Berater Teilzeit domenicale (limited contract)
titleByLocale.fr: Mendrisio Outlet Client Conseiller Temps partiel domenicale (limited contract)

descriptionByLocale.it: Founded in 1913 in Italy, the Prada Group was built on a tradition of excellence and with a vision of innovation. The Group, a world leader in the luxury sector, operates in more than 45 countries with the PRADA, Miu Miu, Versace, Church’s, Car Shoe and Luna Rossa brands, and has employees of over 100 nationalities. JOB PURPOSE As Client Advisor, you guarantee an extraordinary and memorable luxury client experience, placing the Client above all, discovering their needs and expectations, fostering meaningful relationships, serving as a Brand Ambassador. You convey and promote the Brand philosophy and Values to the final Clients guiding them into the world our brands. You hold yourself accountable to achieve your individual and team sales target, acting as proactive player in ensuring the best service and responding to the client needs both in store and on ecommerce channel. RESPONSIBILITIES Act as a true brand ambassador, leveraging the human touch to create a welcoming and inspiring environment that drives client engagement and brings the brand’s values to life; Work as a team player and partner with fellow colleagues, foster open and constructive communication, to ensure consistent exceptional experience and contribute to a positive working environment, embracing Diversity and Inclusion values. Embrace leadership behaviors demonstrating a positive attitude and ability to work in team, showing adaptability to the needs of the business. Place the Client at the center, creating a welcoming environment and striving to meet their every need and request, providing them with an excellence service in accordance to the “client journey ceremony”; Be driven to exceed individual sales targets and maximize own sales performances contributing to the success of the entire store; Be driven to exceed KPI goals, ensuring the highest quality of sales and client service; Demonstrate an excellent knowledge of the products as well as our brands, culture and DNA; Build and maintain an ample knowledge of the world of luxury fashion by being constantly informed on fashion trends and competitors, with the purpose to be able to discuss them with the clients and to give advises; Take ownership of resolving Client complaints liaising with the line manager and Client Service team, when necessary; Operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Products; Utilize Company digital tools actively to offer a complete and integrated luxury experience; Capture Client data into the Company CRM with the purpose of connecting to the client, maintaining and developing the relationships (when CRM campaigns will be activated) to offer a personalized approach and develop future opportunities; Embrace and promote the Omni Channel mindset; Host and conduct client appointments either in presence or leveraging technology to do virtual meeting; Work in synergy with the Back of House, participating to the daily operations of the store and preserving the stock room organized; Act in compliance with Company operational and stock procedures, ensuring the safeguarding of Company assets, cash handling (as required, in line with store leadership requests), inventory, logistics and all key reporting activities required by Head Office, while proactively executing Company policies and procedures. KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS Passion for building long-lasting relationships with clients and peers Problem solving, curiosity and interest in luxury/fashion Experience in a luxury or premium retail environment is a plus Being able to work in team, as well as alone Excellent communication and interpersonal skills Fluent spoken English expected Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.

Place the Client at the center, creating a welcoming environment and striving to meet their every need and request, providing them with an excellence service in accordance to the “client journey ceremony”; Be driven to exceed individual sales targets and maximize own sales performances contributing to the success of the entire store; Be driven to exceed KPI goals, ensuring the highest quality of sales and client service; Demonstrate an excellent knowledge of the products as well as our brands, culture and DNA; Build and maintain an ample knowledge of the world of luxury fashion by being constantly informed on fashion trends and competitors, with the purpose to be able to discuss them with the clients and to give advises; Take ownership of resolving Client complaints liaising with the line manager and Client Service team, when necessary; Operate with the highest level of care and respect for the Products; Utilize Company digital tools actively to offer a complete and integrated luxury experience; Capture Client data into the Company CRM with the purpose of connecting to the client, maintaining and developing the relationships (when CRM campaigns will be activated) to offer a personalized approach and develop future opportunities; Embrace and promote the Omni Channel mindset; Host and conduct client appointments either in presence or leveraging technology to do virtual meeting; Work in synergy with the Back of House, participating to the daily operations of the store and preserving the stock room organized; Act in compliance with Company operational and stock procedures, ensuring the safeguarding of Company assets, cash handling (as required, in line with store leadership requests), inventory, logistics and all key reporting activities required by Head Office, while proactively executing Company policies and procedures. KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS Passion for building long-lasting relationships with clients and peers Problem solving, curiosity and interest in luxury/fashion Experience in a luxury or premium retail environment is a plus Being able to work in team, as well as alone Excellent communication and interpersonal skills Fluent spoken English expected Joining our Company means working in a creative and international environment, with teams of people motivated by curiosity and the quest for excellence. The engine of our success is the importance and value that we place on the talent and passion of our people leading to their own professional growth. Prada Group promotes an inclusive work environment, ensuring equal opportunities for all candidates, regardless of gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability, or other personal characteristics. We believe that diversity is a value and we are committed to build a fair and respectful workplace for all.
